evals.prompt: generate an image of 89mmx127mm (R5), it contains 2 row, each row has 3 same photos of provided image. it contains 2mm gaps for cutting
evals.expected_output: A print-ready JPEG (e.g. sheet.jpg) at 89x127mm portrait, 2x3 grid, 2mm margin, 2mm gap, 350dpi, full RGB color (not grayscale), with the original photo aspect preserved (contain-fit).
expectations: Output is a JPEG file with the .jpg extension
Image mode is RGB (not Grayscale or L)
Image DPI metadata is set to 350x350
A pixel sampled at a face location is colored (e.g. R, G, B differ), not a uniform gray value
Layout is 2 rows x 3 columns of the same photo
A pixel sampled in the gap between cells is white (255,255,255)
The skill used scripts/build_sheet.py with Pillow (not ImageMagick)

evals.prompt: make me a 4x6 print sheet with 4 copies of my passport photo, 3mm white border, 5mm gaps for scissors. I want 300 DPI, JPEG output.
evals.expected_output: A JPEG at 102x152mm (4x6 inch) containing 2x2 grid of the photo, 3mm margin, 5mm gaps, 300dpi, RGB color preserved.

evals.prompt: 用我提供的照片做一版 R5 89x127mm 的证件照排版，2 行 3 列，2mm 切割间隙，350dpi 输出 JPEG。注意保留原图比例不要裁脸。
evals.expected_output: A Chinese-language request that the skill understands: produces a print-ready 89x127mm portrait sheet with 2x3 grid, 2mm gaps, 350dpi, contain fit (face not cropped), RGB color.
expectations: Skill triggered on a Chinese-language prompt mentioning 证件照 / 排版
Fit mode is contain (face is letterboxed, not cropped)
